arm1.title: On the inevitability of microvascular failure in septic shock and other vasodilatory conditions.
arm1.title_ko: 패혈성 쇼크 및 기타 혈관확장성 병태에서 미세혈관 부전의 필연성에 관하여
arm1.clinicalQuestion_ko: 패혈성 쇼크 및 기타 혈관확장성 상태에서, 대순환의 혈압과 심박출량(cardiac output)이 회복되었음에도 불구하고 왜 이질적인 미세순환 기능장애(haemodynamic incoherence)가 지속되는가, 그리고 이를 혈관확장·유량 제한·shear 조절의 상호작용에서 비롯되는 필연적 결과로 설명하는 기전 모델을 세울 수 있는가?

pico.population: [Country NR] A simulated (in silico) microcirculatory network of one million parallel arterioles in Python (JupyterLab v4.3.4), with vessel radii drawn from a truncated normal distribution (physiological bounds 0–100 microns), mean radius varied 20–30 microns and standard deviation 1.5–3 microns; not human or animal subjects but a computational model of the human microcirculation (true parallel arteriole number probably closer to 100 million, scaled down by a factor of 100 for computation).
pico.intervention: A conceptual and computational model in which each vessel's flow demand (Q) is set by an 'apparent shear target' derived from the laminar shear equation (dynamic viscosity 0.003 Pa·s; apparent shear target 10–20 Pa), with total required cardiac output computed as the sum of individual vessel demands; simulated global vasodilation via rising mean vessel radius (20→30 microns).
pico.comparison: Baseline reference network at a mean vessel radius of 20 microns (no vessel dropout), against which relative network resistance and functional derecruitment at larger mean radii were compared; and comparison of shear targets of 10 vs 20 Pa.
pico.outcome: Minimum cardiac output required to maintain the global shear target rose almost linearly with mean vessel radius (total flow demand proportional to the sum of vessel radii cubed): at shear target 20 Pa and SD 1.5 microns, from ~5 L/min at mean radius 25 microns to ~8.5 L/min at 30 microns. No comparative statistics (no OR/HR/CI/p-values) were reported — this is a deterministic simulation.

pico_ko.population: [국가 미기재] Python(JupyterLab v4.3.4)으로 시뮬레이션한 100만 개 평행 세동맥(arteriole)의 미세순환 네트워크(in silico). 혈관 반지름은 절단 정규분포(생리학적 경계 0–100 microns)에서 추출했고, 평균 반지름 20–30 microns, 표준편차 1.5–3 microns로 변화시킴. 실제 사람/동물 대상이 아니라 인체 미세순환의 전산 모델이며, 실제 평행 세동맥 수는 약 1억 개에 가깝지만 계산 편의를 위해 100분의 1로 축소함.
pico_ko.intervention: 각 혈관의 유량 요구(Q)를 층류 shear 방정식에서 유도한 'apparent shear target'로 설정한 개념적·전산 모델(dynamic viscosity 0.003 Pa·s, apparent shear target 10–20 Pa). 필요한 총 심박출량은 개별 혈관 요구량의 합으로 계산했고, 평균 혈관 반지름을 20→30 microns로 늘려 전신 혈관확장을 모사함.
pico_ko.comparison: 평균 혈관 반지름 20 microns인 기준 네트워크(혈관 탈락 없음)를 기준으로, 더 큰 평균 반지름에서의 상대적 네트워크 저항 및 기능적 derecruitment를 비교했고, shear target 10 Pa 대 20 Pa도 비교함.
pico_ko.outcome: 전체 shear target을 유지하는 데 필요한 최소 심박출량은 평균 혈관 반지름에 따라 거의 선형으로 증가함(총 유량 요구는 혈관 반지름 세제곱의 합에 비례). shear target 20 Pa, SD 1.5 microns에서 평균 반지름 25 microns일 때 약 5 L/min, 30 microns일 때 약 8.5 L/min. 비교 통계(OR/HR/CI/p-value)는 보고되지 않았으며, 결정론적(deterministic) 시뮬레이션임.

keyFindings: In a one-million-vessel simulation, total cardiac output required to maintain a fixed shear target rises in proportion to the sum of vessel radii cubed, so even modest global vasodilation sharply increases required flow — at shear 20 Pa/SD 1.5 microns, from ~5 L/min (mean radius 25 microns) to ~8.5 L/min (30 microns).

When cardiac output cannot meet demand, low-shear vessels functionally derecruit: increasing mean radius from 25 to 30 microns at a fixed 5000 mL/min caused almost 50% vessel dropout with network resistance falling to 33% of baseline, reproducing the reduced functional capillary density and hyperdynamic, low-resistance circulation of severe sepsis.

Lowering the apparent shear target from 20 to 10 Pa halved the cardiac output requirement, suggesting microvascular coherence could in principle be restored by reducing vasodilation or shear demand rather than by achieving supranormal cardiac output.
keyFindings_ko: 100만 혈관 시뮬레이션에서, 고정된 shear target을 유지하는 데 필요한 총 심박출량은 혈관 반지름 세제곱의 합에 비례해 증가하므로, 경미한 전신 혈관확장만으로도 필요 유량이 급격히 늘어남 — shear 20 Pa/SD 1.5 microns에서 평균 반지름 25 microns일 때 약 5 L/min, 30 microns일 때 약 8.5 L/min.

심박출량이 수요를 못 따라가면 저-shear 혈관이 기능적으로 derecruit됨: 고정 5000 mL/min에서 평균 반지름을 25→30 microns로 늘리자 약 50% 혈관 탈락과 함께 네트워크 저항이 기준의 33%로 떨어졌고, 이는 severe sepsis의 functional capillary density 감소 및 hyperdynamic·저저항 순환을 재현함.
apparent shear target을 20에서 10 Pa로 낮추면 심박출량 요구가 절반으로 감소해, supranormal cardiac output 달성이 아니라 혈관확장이나 shear 수요를 줄임으로써 미세혈관 coherence를 원리적으로 회복할 수 있음을 시사함.
arm1.fullText:
### Background
Sepsis is the most common cause of circulatory failure treated in the intensive care unit. Despite this, a consistent understanding of the pathophysiology has been elusive. At first, it was thought sepsis was a standard low output shock state. Widespread use of the pulmonary artery catheter in the 60s and 70s first revealed the more common hyperdynamic, low resistance situation [, ]. At the same time animal and ex-vivo studies showed widespread arteriolar vasodilation and hypo-responsiveness of micro-vessels to catecholamines and other vasoconstricting agents [, ]. The next several decades of therapeutic theory focussed on enhancing oxygen delivery through targeting ScvO2 and supranormal cardiac index, which ultimately proved fruitless [, ].
Since the turn of the millennium access to new imaging techniques like handheld videomicroscopy has revealed the importance of microcirculatory dysfunction. Capillary perfusion is heterogeneous, with reduced functional capillary density and perfused vessel density, and increased stop flow capillaries [, ]. These changes may persist despite normalisation of macrocirculatory variables such as blood pressure and cardiac output and predict mortality; the so-called haemodynamic incoherence []. A satisfactory explanation for this disconnect has not emerged. Why a global vasodilatory process should lead to such a patchy locally heterogeneous problem is unclear. While it is possible that the two phenomena are completely separate, purely vasodilatory conditions such as calcium channel blocker overdose also result in the same microvascular impairment despite high global flow [].
Shear stress is the force exerted by flowing blood on the endothelium, in the direction parallel to the vessel wall. Shear signalling in normal endothelium involves feedback that maintains shear stress within vessels within a given range. Shear is increased by flow and by a reduction in vessel size. When shear is excessive, the signalling pathway will result in local release of nitric oxide (NO), which dilates the vessel and reduces the shear stress back to an acceptable range. Low shear produces endothelin, which constricts the vessel. Sensing of shear occurs via mechanotransduction proteins in the endothelial glycocalyx and gap junctions. Shear regulation is prominent within the microcirculation [, ].
Shear signalling is known to be abnormal in septic shock. Excessive expression of inducible NO synthase (iNOS) results in elevated levels of NO []. At the same time endothelial damage disrupts mechanotransducers and inflammatory cytokines inhibit signalling pathways, resulting in impairment of shear sensing [, ]. These observations have been linked generally to the development of microvascular dysfunction, but not through a mechanistic hypothesis.
The aim of this paper is to put forward a hypothesis that explains these disparate findings, and model how the microcirculation is constrained by three main factors; total cardiac output, vasomotor state, and shear regulation. Predictable behaviour of the microcirculation naturally emerges from changes in these variables.

### Methods
A microcirculatory network consisting of one million parallel arterioles was simulated in Python using JupyterLab (v 4.3.4). The distribution of vessel radii was simulated with a truncated normal distribution (with lower and upper physiological bounds of 0 and 100 microns). The mean vessel radius was varied between 20 and 30 microns, and the standard deviation between 1.5 and 3 microns, consistent with the typical size of arterioles in the microcirculation []. Typical numbers of parallel arterioles in the human body are unknown exactly, but probably closer to 100 million (based on roughly 10 capillaries and each arteriole feeding a bed of 100 capillaries [, ]), however the simulation was scaled for ease of computation, as explained further below.

### Model parameters
Shear stress in the arterioles, where the Womersley number < < 1, is given by the laminar shear equation;
is shear stress in Pa, µ is dynamic viscosity in Pa·s, Q is mean flow in m·s, and r is radius in metres.
A typical value of 0.003 Pa·s was used for dynamic viscosity. Although blood is shear thinning and changes its viscosity depending on velocity and vessel size, these effects were considered overall negligible on the outcome of the model.
The typical value of shear stress in arterioles is unknown, but has been observed to be 1–7 Pa in larger arteries and ten times less in capillaries [, ]. However given that the model is roughly scaled down in total vessel number by a factor of 100, 10–20 Pa was used as the model parameter. This is a scaled parameter that assumes that the typical value of shear in arterioles is closer to that in capillaries (multiplied by 100) and that produces realistic cardiac outputs in the model output. This is assumed to be a target value. In real vascular networks, the shear target will vary slightly from vessel to vessel, and regulation will not be exact, however for the purposes of the model I assume a single value across the network. Equation 1 can then be re-arranged as follows;
This is the flow that each vessel will demand to satisfy its apparent shear target (). I refer to an apparent shear target as the endothelium’s sensing of shear may not be perfectly calibrated to the actual level of shear. If sensing is perfect then actual shear is equal to apparent shear. However if shear sensing is inhibited, the vessel will constrict even though actual shear may be adequate. Thus, the apparent shear target will be raised.
For a given distribution of vessel sizes within the network, the total cardiac output required to satisfy the shear target in all vessels is simply the sum of all individual values of Q.

### Model output
The model calculated Q for each vessel in the one million vessel network based on the set apparent shear target and the distribution of vessel sizes. It displayed the minimum cardiac output required to satisfy the global shear target plotted against the mean vessel radius, with sliders to adjust the standard deviation of vessel radii between 1.5 and 3 microns, and apparent shear target between 10 and 20 Pa. Rightward movement along the x-axis therefore represents attempted uniform vasodilatation. Plots of vessel size distribution at each standard deviation, for a mean of 25 microns, were also produced. Units were converted from the SI units used in the shear equation to mL·min for flow and microns for vessel radius.
If cardiac output is not able to meet the minimal requirement, some vessels will experience shear below their target and constrict in response. Hypothetically, vessel de-recruitment should occur and vessels will be lost from the network, decreasing the overall flow requirement until an equilibrium is achieved again, at a reduced functional capillary density. Such an idealised response was implemented in this model in order to study network flow shunting behaviour, accepting that such regulation is not perfect in real biological systems. The model therefore also simulated a fixed cardiac output of 5000 mL·min, with standard deviation 1.5 microns and shear target 20 Pa. As mean vessel radius was increased from 20 to 30 microns, it iteratively removed the smallest vessels from the distribution, updating the distribution until total shear requirements were satisfied. It displayed a plot of vessel distribution, the total number of remaining vessels out of the initial million, and the relative resistance of the network compared to a baseline mean radius of 20 microns (where there was no vessel dropout). For each distribution, resistance (R) is;
The relative resistance is R calculated from Eq.  in the updated distribution divided by that in the distribution at a mean of 20 microns.

### Results
Over the studied vessel range the minimum cardiac output required to maintain the global shear target increased almost linearly with the mean vessel radius. The required cardiac output, at a shear target of 20 Pa and standard deviation of 1.5 microns, increased from approximately 5 L per minute at a mean radius of 25 microns, to approximately 8.5 L per minute at a radius of 30 microns (Fig. ). Illustrative distribution of vessel sizes at a mean of 25 microns is shown in Fig. .
[object Object]
[object Object]
An increase in the standard deviation of vessel size from 1.5 microns to 3 microns resulted in a very small shift of the curve upwards, as illustrated in Fig. . A decrease in target shear from 20 to 10 Pa resulted in a significant drop in cardiac output requirement, halving it for the same mean vessel radius and for a given standard deviation of vessel radii (Fig. ).
For the fixed cardiac output analysis, at a mean of 25 microns, all of the initial one million vessels remained recruited and resistance was 41% of that at a mean of 20 microns. Increasing the mean to 30 microns resulted in almost 50% vessel dropout (similar to the reduction of functional capillary density observed in severe sepsis) and a resistance 33% of baseline. The drop in resistance would have been 20% of baseline without any vessel dropout. The latter distribution is shown in Fig. .

### Discussion
I have illustrated a hypothetical model of the microcirculation that is constrained by three elements; cardiac output, shear regulation, and vasomotor state. The model produces the characteristic microcirculatory changes seen in vasodilatory shock. When the microcirculation dilates (increases the sum of its radii cubed), cardiac output must increase in proportion to the sum of radii cubed in order to preserve the same level of shear. If this cannot be achieved, then vasoconstrictive responses triggered by low shear will close off branches of the microcirculation, reducing functional capillary density. arm2.title_ko: 중증 환자의 신속연속기관삽관(RSI)에서 propofol 대 ketamine 비교: 전향적 무작위 대조 시험 (PROMINE)
arm2.clinicalQuestion: Among critically ill adults requiring rapid sequence intubation (RSI), is ketamine a better hypnotic induction agent than propofol with respect to post-induction hemodynamics, particularly the lowest mean arterial pressure within the first 10 minutes?
arm2.clinicalQuestion_ko: 신속연속기관삽관(RSI)이 필요한 중증 성인 환자에서 ketamine이 propofol보다 유도 후 혈역학, 특히 유도 후 10분 이내 최저 평균동맥압(MAP) 측면에서 더 나은 최면 유도제인가?

pico.population: [Brazil] Adults (≥ 18 years) requiring rapid sequence intubation in two mixed ICUs; 207 patients randomized from October 2021 to October 2023, with 175 included in the modified intention-to-treat analysis (91 ketamine, 84 propofol).
pico.intervention: Ketamine for RSI induction, assigned 1:1 (2 mg/kg bolus per trial protocol/registry).
pico.comparison: Propofol for RSI induction (1.5 mg/kg bolus per trial protocol/registry).
pico.outcome: Primary outcome: lowest mean arterial pressure (MAP) within the first 10 min after induction (adjusted for age, baseline MAP, and total vasopressor dose within 10 min). Lowest MAP was 66 (55–79) mmHg with ketamine vs 60 (48–72) mmHg with propofol (mean difference 6.0 [95% CI −0.0 to 11.9]; p = 0.050).

pico_ko.population: [브라질] 두 곳의 혼합 ICU에서 신속연속기관삽관(RSI)이 필요한 성인(≥ 18세) 환자; 2021년 10월부터 2023년 10월까지 207명이 무작위 배정되었고 modified intention-to-treat 분석에는 175명(ketamine 91명, propofol 84명)이 포함됨.
pico_ko.intervention: RSI 유도를 위한 ketamine, 1:1 배정 (시험 프로토콜/등록정보 기준 2 mg/kg 볼루스).
pico_ko.comparison: RSI 유도를 위한 propofol (시험 프로토콜/등록정보 기준 1.5 mg/kg 볼루스).
pico_ko.outcome: 일차 결과: 유도 후 10분 이내 최저 평균동맥압(MAP) (나이, 기저 MAP, 10분 이내 총 승압제 용량으로 보정). 최저 MAP은 ketamine 66 (55–79) mmHg 대 propofol 60 (48–72) mmHg (mean difference 6.0 [95% CI −0.0 to 11.9]; p = 0.050).

secondaryOutcomes: Average MAP difference over the first hour: 1.67 (95% CI −1.98 to 5.31).
Cardiovascular collapse (mainly due to an increase in vasopressor dose within 2 min): 20/91 (22%) with ketamine vs 28/84 (33%) with propofol.
Day-7 mortality 33% (ketamine) vs 23.8% (propofol) (OR 1.38; 95% CI 0.86–2.24); hospital mortality 60.4% vs 50.0% (OR 1.21; 95% CI 0.92–1.58).
secondaryOutcomes_ko: 첫 1시간 동안 평균 MAP 차이: 1.67 (95% CI −1.98 to 5.31).
심혈관 허탈(cardiovascular collapse, 주로 2분 이내 승압제 용량 증가에 기인): ketamine 20/91 (22%) 대 propofol 28/84 (33%).

statGlossary.explanation_ko: 두 군의 평균값 차이로, 0이면 차이 없음을 의미. 예: 최저 MAP mean difference 6.0 mmHg → ketamine군의 최저 MAP이 propofol군보다 평균 6 mmHg 높았음.
95% 신뢰구간으로, 참값이 있을 것으로 추정되는 범위이며 차이 지표(mean difference)에서 0을, 비율 지표(OR)에서 1을 포함하면 통계적으로 유의하지 않음. 예: mean difference 6.0의 95% CI −0.0 to 11.9 → 0을 걸쳐 유의성 경계.
관찰된 차이가 우연일 확률로, 보통 0.05 미만이면 통계적으로 유의하다고 봄. 예: p = 0.050 → 유의성 경계선상이라 명확한 유의 차이로 보기 어려움.
오즈비(odds ratio)로, 1보다 크면 해당 군에서 사건 발생 오즈가 높음을 의미하고 95% CI가 1을 포함하면 유의하지 않음. 예: 7일 사망률 OR 1.38 (95% CI 0.86–2.24) → ketamine군 사망 오즈가 수치상 높았으나 통계적으로 유의하지 않음.

practiceChange: Do not choose ketamine over propofol for RSI in critically ill patients on the basis of hemodynamic safety alone: the lowest-MAP advantage was small (~6 mmHg), borderline (p = 0.050), and not sustained over the first hour (mean difference 1.67 mmHg).

Regardless of induction agent chosen, anticipate and pre-empt peri-intubation hypotension in critically ill patients—cardiovascular collapse occurred in 22% (ketamine) and 33% (propofol)—by ensuring volume/vasopressor readiness before induction.

Do not interpret this trial as showing a mortality signal for either agent: day-7 and hospital mortality differences (OR 1.38 and 1.21) had wide CIs crossing 1 and the trial was not powered for mortality; await larger trials before changing agent selection for outcome reasons.
practiceChange_ko: 중증 환자의 RSI에서 혈역학적 안전성만을 근거로 propofol 대신 ketamine을 선택하지 말 것: 최저 MAP 이점은 작고(~6 mmHg) 경계선상(p = 0.050)이었으며 첫 1시간 동안 유지되지 않았음(mean difference 1.67 mmHg).
선택한 유도제와 무관하게 중증 환자에서 삽관 전후 저혈압을 예상하고 선제 대응할 것—심혈관 허탈이 ketamine 22%, propofol 33%에서 발생—유도 전에 수액/승압제를 준비해 둘 것.
이 시험을 어느 한 약제의 사망률 신호로 해석하지 말 것: 7일 및 병원 내 사망률 차이(OR 1.38, 1.21)는 95% CI가 1을 넓게 포함하고 시험이 사망률에 대한 검정력을 갖추지 않았으므로, 결과 기반의 약제 선택 변경은 더 큰 시험 결과를 기다릴 것.
keyFindings: Ketamine produced a slightly higher lowest MAP within 10 min than propofol (66 [55–79] vs 60 [48–72] mmHg; mean difference 6.0 [95% CI −0.0 to 11.9]; p = 0.050), a borderline and not clinically meaningful difference.

The hemodynamic advantage was not sustained: the average MAP difference over the first hour was only 1.67 (95% CI −1.98 to 5.31), and cardiovascular collapse occurred in 22% (20/91) of ketamine vs 33% (28/84) of propofol patients.
No significant mortality difference was seen: day-7 mortality 33% vs 23.8% (OR 1.38; 95% CI 0.86–2.24) and hospital mortality 60.4% vs 50.0% (OR 1.21; 95% CI 0.92–1.58).
keyFindings_ko: Ketamine은 propofol보다 10분 이내 최저 MAP이 약간 높았으나(66 [55–79] 대 60 [48–72] mmHg; mean difference 6.0 [95% CI −0.0 to 11.9]; p = 0.050) 경계선상이며 임상적으로 유의미하지 않은 차이였음.
혈역학적 이점은 유지되지 않았음: 첫 1시간 평균 MAP 차이는 1.67(95% CI −1.98 to 5.31)에 불과했고, 심혈관 허탈은 ketamine 22%(20/91) 대 propofol 33%(28/84)에서 발생.
arm2.clinicalTakeaway: In this open-label RCT of critically ill adults undergoing RSI, ketamine offered only a small, borderline, and transient advantage in post-induction MAP over propofol, with no sustained hemodynamic or mortality benefit. Agent selection should not rest solely on a presumed lower hypotension risk of ketamine; both agents caused substantial peri-intubation cardiovascular collapse, so hemodynamic optimization before intubation matters more than the specific hypnotic chosen.
arm2.clinicalTakeaway_ko: RSI를 받는 중증 성인을 대상으로 한 이 open-label RCT에서 ketamine은 propofol에 비해 유도 후 MAP에서 작고 경계선상이며 일시적인 이점만 보였고, 지속적인 혈역학적 또는 사망률 이득은 없었음. 약제 선택을 ketamine의 저혈압 위험이 낮다는 가정에만 근거해서는 안 되며, 두 약제 모두 상당한 삽관 전후 심혈관 허탈을 일으켰으므로 특정 최면제보다 삽관 전 혈역학 최적화가 더 중요함.
arm2.limitations: Open-label design (no blinding of clinicians) risks performance bias, particularly for vasopressor titration that defines both the primary adjustment covariate and the cardiovascular-collapse outcome. The trial was conducted in only two ICUs in a single country (Brazil), limiting generalizability, and was modest in size (207 randomized, 175 in mITT) and not powered for mortality (wide CIs crossing 1). The primary result was borderline (p = 0.050) and 32 randomized patients were excluded from the mITT analysis. Baseline group comparability was not confirmable from the abstract/registry.
arm2.limitations_ko: Open-label 설계(임상의 비맹검)로 인해 수행 편향(performance bias)의 위험이 있으며, 특히 일차 보정 공변량이자 심혈관 허탈 결과를 정의하는 승압제 적정에서 그러함. 이 시험은 단일 국가(브라질)의 두 ICU에서만 수행되어 일반화 가능성이 제한되고, 규모가 크지 않으며(207명 무작위 배정, mITT 175명) 사망률에 대한 검정력이 없음(95% CI가 1을 넓게 포함). 일차 결과는 경계선상이었고(p = 0.050) 32명의 무작위 배정 환자가 mITT 분석에서 제외됨. 기저 군 간 비교 가능성은 초록/등록정보로는 확인 불가.

paper.title: Propofol versus ketamine in rapid sequence intubation in critically ill patients: a prospective, randomized, controlled trial.
paper.abstract:
PURPOSE: The optimal hypnotic agent for rapid sequence intubation (RSI) in critically ill patients remains uncertain. We evaluated whether Ketamine is a better alternative than propofol.
METHODS: In this investigator-initiated, randomized, controlled, open-label trial conducted in two mixed ICU, adults (≥ 18 years) requiring RSI were assigned 1:1 to Ketamine or propofol. The primary outcome was the lowest mean arterial pressure (MAP) within the first 10 min after induction, analyzed with a linear regression model adjusted for age, baseline MAP, and total vasopressor dose within 10 min.
RESULTS: From October 2021 to October 2023, 207 patients were randomized and 175 were included in the modified intention-to-treat analysis. The lowest MAP within 10 min was 66 (55-79) mmHg with Ketamine and 60 (48-72) mmHg with propofol (mean difference, 6.0 [95% CI - 0.0 to 11.9]; p = 0.050). The average MAP difference over the first hour was 1.67 (95% CI - 1.98 to 5.31). Cardiovascular collapse occurred in 20/91(22%) Ketamine-treated patients and 28/84 (33%) receiving propofol, mainly due to an increase in the vasopressor dose within 2 min. Day-7 mortality was 33% with Ketamine and 23.8% with propofol (OR 1.38; 95% CI 0.86-2.24). Hospital mortality was 60.4% and 50.0%, respectively (OR 1.21; 95% CI 0.92-1.58).
CONCLUSIONS: Among critically ill patients undergoing RSI, Ketamine resulted in a less pronounced decrease in MAP in the first 10 min compared with propofol, but the difference was not clinically meaningful or sustained. These findings challenge sedative selection based solely on perceived risk of hypotension and highlight the need for larger trials to determine the optimal induction agent.
GOV REGISTRY: NCT05092152-initial release 10.13.2021.

arm1.clinicalQuestion: In patients with cardiogenic shock, which advanced haemodynamic monitoring methods provide clinically useful information, carry prognostic value, and can be used for phenotypic risk classification and to guide individualized management?
arm1.clinicalQuestion_ko: 심인성 쇼크(cardiogenic shock) 환자에서 어떤 고급 혈역학 모니터링 방법이 임상적으로 유용한 정보를 제공하고, 예후 가치를 지니며, 표현형 기반 위험 분류와 개별화된 치료 유도에 활용될 수 있는가?

pico.population: [Country NR] Patients with cardiogenic shock, including phenotypes of isolated right ventricular failure, biventricular dysfunction, and mixed cardiogenic shock, which are 'associated with poor outcomes and require different management strategies' (narrative review; no sample size, age, or date range reported).
pico.intervention: Advanced, multimodal haemodynamic monitoring providing complementary information, including 'early use of pulmonary artery catheters to guide management' and advanced echocardiography, with individual variables such as the velocity time integral at the left ventricular outflow tract (LVOT VTI), pulmonary artery pulsatility index (PAPi), and cardiac power output (CPO).
pico.comparison: None — narrative review; no comparator group or control condition is defined.
pico.outcome: Prognostic value and phenotypic risk classification: the review states that LVOT VTI, PAPi, and cardiac power output are 'prognostically significant,' but no effect sizes, cutoff values, confidence intervals, or p-values are reported in the abstract.

pico_ko.population: [국가 미기재] 심인성 쇼크(cardiogenic shock) 환자로, 고립성 우심실 부전(isolated right ventricular failure), 양심실 기능부전(biventricular dysfunction), 혼합형 심인성 쇼크(mixed cardiogenic shock) 표현형을 포함하며 이들은 '불량한 예후와 연관되고 서로 다른 치료 전략을 요한다'(내러티브 리뷰로 표본 수·연령·기간 미보고).
pico_ko.intervention: 상호 보완적 정보를 제공하는 고급·다중양식(multimodal) 혈역학 모니터링으로, '치료 유도를 위한 폐동맥 카테터(pulmonary artery catheter)의 조기 사용'과 고급 심초음파(echocardiography)를 포함하며, 개별 변수로 LVOT VTI(left ventricular outflow tract velocity time integral), PAPi(pulmonary artery pulsatility index), CPO(cardiac power output) 등이 있다.
pico_ko.comparison: 없음 — 내러티브 리뷰로 비교군이나 대조 조건이 정의되지 않음.
pico_ko.outcome: 예후 가치 및 표현형 기반 위험 분류: 본 리뷰는 LVOT VTI, PAPi, cardiac power output이 '예후적으로 유의하다'고 서술하나, 초록에는 효과 크기·컷오프 값·신뢰구간·p-value가 보고되지 않음.

practiceChange: Do not rely on a single hemodynamic parameter in cardiogenic shock; combine advanced echocardiography (e.g., LVOT VTI) with invasive data (PAPi, cardiac power output) to distinguish isolated RV failure, biventricular, and mixed phenotypes, because these require different management strategies.

Consider early pulmonary artery catheterization to guide management in cardiogenic shock, as this review states recent studies support its early use — while recognizing this is a narrative review, not confirmatory trial evidence.
Use these hemodynamic variables for prognostication and SCAI-style risk stratification, but await ongoing trials before adopting fixed monitoring-driven treatment algorithms as standard of care.
practiceChange_ko: 심인성 쇼크에서 단일 혈역학 지표에 의존하지 말고, 고급 심초음파(예: LVOT VTI)와 침습적 데이터(PAPi, cardiac power output)를 결합해 고립성 우심실 부전·양심실·혼합형 표현형을 구분하라 — 이들은 서로 다른 치료 전략을 요하기 때문이다.
본 리뷰가 최근 연구들이 폐동맥 카테터(PAC)의 조기 사용을 뒷받침한다고 서술하므로 심인성 쇼크에서 치료 유도를 위한 PAC 조기 삽입을 고려하라 — 단, 이는 확증적 임상시험 근거가 아닌 내러티브 리뷰임을 유념한다.
이들 혈역학 변수를 예후 예측 및 SCAI 방식 위험 계층화에 활용하되, 모니터링 기반 치료 알고리즘을 표준으로 채택하기 전에 진행 중인 임상시험 결과를 기다려라.
keyFindings: Cardiogenic shock is heterogeneous: multimodal haemodynamic monitoring enables identification of distinct phenotypes — isolated right ventricular failure, biventricular dysfunction, and mixed cardiogenic shock — each associated with poor outcomes and requiring different management strategies.

Individual haemodynamic variables — LVOT velocity time integral (VTI), pulmonary artery pulsatility index (PAPi), and cardiac power output (CPO) — are described as prognostically significant (no numeric effect sizes reported in the abstract).
Recent studies support the early use of pulmonary artery catheters to guide management, and combined pulmonary artery catheterization plus advanced echocardiography helps tailor treatment.
keyFindings_ko: 심인성 쇼크는 이질적 질환으로, 다중양식 혈역학 모니터링을 통해 고립성 우심실 부전·양심실 기능부전·혼합형 심인성 쇼크라는 뚜렷한 표현형을 구분할 수 있으며, 각각 불량한 예후와 연관되고 서로 다른 치료 전략을 요한다.
개별 혈역학 변수인 LVOT VTI(velocity time integral), PAPi(pulmonary artery pulsatility index), CPO(cardiac power output)가 예후적으로 유의한 것으로 기술됨(초록에 수치적 효과 크기는 미보고).
최근 연구들은 치료 유도를 위한 폐동맥 카테터(PAC)의 조기 사용을 뒷받침하며, PAC와 고급 심초음파의 병용이 치료 개별화에 도움이 된다.
arm1.clinicalTakeaway: In cardiogenic shock, layer advanced haemodynamic monitoring — advanced echocardiography (LVOT VTI) plus invasive metrics (PAPi, cardiac power output, PAC data) — to phenotype the patient and estimate prognosis rather than treating all shock alike. Recent data favor early PAC use to guide therapy, but because this is a narrative review the recommendation should be applied pragmatically while confirmatory trials are pending.
arm1.clinicalTakeaway_ko: 심인성 쇼크에서는 모든 쇼크를 동일하게 치료하기보다, 고급 심초음파(LVOT VTI)와 침습적 지표(PAPi, cardiac power output, PAC 데이터)를 결합한 고급 혈역학 모니터링을 층층이 활용해 환자 표현형을 규정하고 예후를 추정하라. 최근 데이터는 치료 유도를 위한 PAC 조기 사용을 지지하나, 본 연구가 내러티브 리뷰인 만큼 확증적 임상시험이 나오기 전까지는 실용적으로 적용해야 한다.
arm1.limitations: This is a narrative review ('Purpose of review' format), not a systematic review or original study; it reports no sample sizes, effect sizes, confidence intervals, or p-values, and provides no formal risk-of-bias or GRADE assessment. Recommendations (e.g., early PAC use) are based on cited recent studies rather than the authors' own comparative data, and the review itself acknowledges that ongoing trials are still needed to define the timing and use of these tools.
arm1.limitations_ko: 본 논문은 원저나 체계적 문헌고찰이 아닌 내러티브 리뷰('Purpose of review' 형식)로, 표본 수·효과 크기·신뢰구간·p-value를 보고하지 않으며 공식적인 비뚤림 위험 평가나 GRADE 평가도 제공하지 않는다. 권고(예: PAC 조기 사용)는 저자 자신의 비교 데이터가 아니라 인용된 최근 연구들에 근거하며, 리뷰 스스로도 이들 도구의 시기와 사용을 규정하기 위한 임상시험이 여전히 필요함을 인정하고 있다.

paper.title: Advanced haemodynamic monitoring in cardiogenic shock.
paper.abstract:
PURPOSE OF REVIEW: To describe haemodynamic monitoring methods that may be used in cardiogenic shock including the information they provide, their prognostic value, how they may be used for risk classification and guiding management.
RECENT FINDINGS: Haemodynamic monitoring in cardiogenic shock encompasses multimodal techniques that provide complementary information to enable identification of different cardiogenic shock phenotypes. Isolated right ventricular failure, biventricular dysfunction, and mixed cardiogenic shock are associated with poor outcomes and require different management strategies. Individual haemodynamic variables such as the velocity time integral at the left ventricular outflow tract, pulmonary artery pulsatility index, and cardiac power output are prognostically significant. Recent studies support the early use of pulmonary artery catheters to guide management.
SUMMARY: Cardiogenic shock remains a highly lethal condition. Haemodynamic monitoring enables phenotypic profiling and confers prognostic information. Combined strategies including pulmonary artery catheterization and advanced echocardiography help tailor management strategies. Ongoing trials will inform the timing and use of advanced haemodynamic monitoring tools to deliver individualized care.

arm2.title_ko: 조기 패혈성 쇼크에서 승압제냐 수액이냐 (ARISE FLUIDS 시험)
arm2.clinicalQuestion: In adults presenting to the emergency department with early septic shock, does an approach of restricted fluid volume with early vasopressors, compared with greater fluid volume and later vasopressors, increase the number of days alive and out of the hospital at day 90?
arm2.clinicalQuestion_ko: 응급실에 조기 패혈성 쇼크로 내원한 성인에서, 수액을 제한하고 승압제를 조기에 투여하는 전략이 더 많은 수액과 승압제를 늦게 투여하는 전략에 비해 90일째 생존·퇴원 일수(days alive and out of hospital)를 증가시키는가?

pico.population: [International] Adult patients (18 years or older, per protocol) who presented to the emergency department with septic shock (clinically suspected infection with SBP <90 mm Hg or MAP <65 mm Hg despite ≥1000 mL IV fluid over ≤60 minutes and lactate >2.0 mmol/L); 1000 patients underwent randomization (499 vasopressor group, 501 fluids group), with 963 in the intention-to-treat population (481 vs 482). Trial conducted in Australia, New Zealand, and Ireland.
pico.intervention: Fluids at restricted volumes and early vasopressor therapy (vasopressor group) for at least 6 hours and up to 24 hours; in the first 24 hours patients received a median of 1108 mL less IV fluid (median difference −1108 mL; 95% CI −1395 to −850) and vasopressor use was higher by 18.9 percentage points (95% CI 13.3 to 24.5).
pico.comparison: Higher volumes of fluids and later vasopressor therapy (fluids group) for at least 6 hours and up to 24 hours.
pico.outcome: Primary outcome — days alive and out of the hospital from randomization to day 90: median 76 days (IQR 55 to 83) in the vasopressor group vs 76 days (IQR 55 to 82) in the fluids group (difference, 0.0 days; 95% CI −2.7 to 2.7; P = 1.00).

pico_ko.population: [다국가] 응급실에 패혈성 쇼크로 내원한 성인 환자(프로토콜상 18세 이상; 임상적으로 의심되는 감염과 함께 ≤60분간 ≥1000 mL 수액 투여에도 SBP <90 mm Hg 또는 MAP <65 mm Hg, lactate >2.0 mmol/L). 총 1000명이 무작위 배정(승압제군 499명, 수액군 501명)되었고 intention-to-treat 집단은 963명(481명 대 482명). 시험은 호주, 뉴질랜드, 아일랜드에서 시행됨.
pico_ko.intervention: 수액을 제한하고 승압제를 조기에 투여하는 전략(승압제군)을 최소 6시간에서 최대 24시간까지 시행. 첫 24시간 동안 정맥 수액 투여량이 median 1108 mL 더 적었고(median difference −1108 mL; 95% CI −1395 to −850), 승압제 사용률이 18.9 percentage points 더 높았음(95% CI 13.3 to 24.5).
pico_ko.comparison: 더 많은 수액과 승압제를 늦게 투여하는 전략(수액군)을 최소 6시간에서 최대 24시간까지 시행.
pico_ko.outcome: 일차 결과 — 무작위 배정부터 90일째까지의 생존·퇴원 일수(days alive and out of hospital): 승압제군 median 76일(IQR 55–83) 대 수액군 76일(IQR 55–82)(차이 0.0일; 95% CI −2.7 to 2.7; P = 1.00).

secondaryOutcomes: Pulmonary edema (adverse event): 0.6% in the vasopressor group vs 5.0% in the fluids group (P<0.001).
IV fluid volume in the first 24 hours: median difference −1108 mL (95% CI −1395 to −850), less in the vasopressor group.
Proportion of patients who received vasopressors: higher by 18.9 percentage points (95% CI 13.3 to 24.5) in the vasopressor group.
secondaryOutcomes_ko: 폐부종(pulmonary edema, 이상반응): 승압제군 0.6% 대 수액군 5.0% (P<0.001).
첫 24시간 정맥 수액 투여량: median difference −1108 mL (95% CI −1395 to −850)로 승압제군에서 더 적음.
승압제를 투여받은 환자 비율: 승압제군에서 18.9 percentage points 더 높음(95% CI 13.3 to 24.5).

statGlossary.explanation_ko: 95% 신뢰구간: 참값이 있을 것으로 추정되는 범위로, 0(차이 없음)을 포함하면 통계적으로 유의하지 않음. 예: 일차 결과 차이 0.0일, 95% CI −2.7 to 2.7 → 구간이 0을 포함해 두 전략 간 차이가 없음.
P값: 우연만으로 이런 결과가 나올 확률로, 보통 0.05 미만이면 유의하다고 봄. 예: 일차 결과 P = 1.00 → 두 군이 사실상 완전히 동일, 폐부종 P<0.001 → 차이가 우연일 가능성이 매우 낮음.
사분위수 범위(interquartile range): 값을 크기순으로 늘어놓았을 때 가운데 50%가 걸치는 구간으로 분포의 퍼짐을 보여줌. 예: 승압제군 median 76일, IQR 55–83 → 환자의 절반이 55~83일 사이에 분포.
중앙값 차이: 두 군의 median(중앙값)을 뺀 값. 예: 수액량 median difference −1108 mL → 승압제군이 수액군보다 median 1108 mL 적게 투여받음.
퍼센트포인트: 두 비율(%)을 단순히 뺀 절대 차이. 예: 승압제 사용률이 18.9 percentage points 높음 → 승압제군의 사용 비율이 수액군보다 절대값으로 18.9% 더 높음.

practiceChange: Do not adopt a restricted-fluid/early-vasopressor bundle expecting a patient-centered outcome benefit: in ED septic shock it produced no difference in days alive and out of hospital at day 90 (difference 0.0 days; 95% CI −2.7 to 2.7; P=1.00), so either strategy is reasonable within this range of ~1–2 L fluid over 24 hours.

Consider earlier/peripheral vasopressors as a safe way to limit fluid when fluid tolerance is a concern, since the vasopressor strategy markedly reduced pulmonary edema (0.6% vs 5.0%; P<0.001) without excess adverse events.

Individualize early resuscitation after initial fluid — titrate to perfusion, fluid tolerance, and monitoring/resource capacity — rather than mandating a single fixed fluid-versus-vasopressor protocol.
practiceChange_ko: 환자 중심 결과(생존·퇴원 일수) 개선을 기대하며 수액 제한/조기 승압제 번들을 도입하지 말 것: 응급실 패혈성 쇼크에서 90일째 생존·퇴원 일수에 차이가 없었으므로(차이 0.0일; 95% CI −2.7 to 2.7; P=1.00), 24시간 동안 약 1~2 L 수액 범위 내에서는 두 전략 모두 합리적임.
수액 내성(fluid tolerance)이 우려되는 상황에서는 조기·말초(peripheral) 승압제가 수액을 줄이는 안전한 방법이 될 수 있음. 승압제 전략은 이상반응 증가 없이 폐부종을 뚜렷이 줄였음(0.6% 대 5.0%; P<0.001).
단일 고정 프로토콜을 강제하기보다, 초기 수액 투여 이후에는 관류(perfusion)·fluid tolerance·모니터링/자원 여건에 맞춰 조기 소생술을 개별화할 것.
keyFindings: The primary outcome, days alive and out of the hospital at day 90, was identical between groups: median 76 days (IQR 55–83) vasopressor vs 76 days (IQR 55–82) fluids (difference 0.0 days; 95% CI −2.7 to 2.7; P=1.00).

The intervention achieved its intended separation: vasopressor group received a median of 1108 mL less IV fluid in 24 hours (median difference −1108 mL; 95% CI −1395 to −850) and had 18.9 percentage points higher vasopressor use (95% CI 13.3 to 24.5).
Pulmonary edema was substantially less common with the restricted-fluid/early-vasopressor strategy (0.6% vs 5.0%; P<0.001), with adverse events otherwise similar between groups.
keyFindings_ko: 일차 결과인 90일째 생존·퇴원 일수는 두 군이 동일: 승압제군 median 76일(IQR 55–83) 대 수액군 76일(IQR 55–82)(차이 0.0일; 95% CI −2.7 to 2.7; P=1.00).
중재는 의도한 군간 분리를 달성함: 승압제군은 24시간 동안 정맥 수액을 median 1108 mL 적게 투여받았고(median difference −1108 mL; 95% CI −1395 to −850), 승압제 사용률이 18.9 percentage points 높았음(95% CI 13.3 to 24.5).
폐부종은 수액 제한/조기 승압제 전략에서 뚜렷하게 더 적었으며(0.6% 대 5.0%; P<0.001), 그 외 이상반응은 두 군이 비슷했음.
arm2.clinicalTakeaway: In adult ED septic shock, a restricted-fluid/early-vasopressor strategy and a liberal-fluid/later-vasopressor strategy produced the same days alive and out of hospital at day 90 (median 76 vs 76; P=1.00). This means clinicians have latitude to choose either approach; earlier vasopressors are a safe option that reduces pulmonary edema (0.6% vs 5.0%) and can be used when limiting fluid is desirable.
arm2.clinicalTakeaway_ko: 성인 응급실 패혈성 쇼크에서 수액 제한/조기 승압제 전략과 수액 자유/승압제 지연 전략은 90일째 생존·퇴원 일수가 동일했습니다(median 76 대 76; P=1.00). 즉 임상의는 두 접근 중 어느 쪽도 선택할 여지가 있으며, 조기 승압제는 폐부종을 줄이는(0.6% 대 5.0%) 안전한 선택지로 수액을 제한하고자 할 때 사용할 수 있습니다.
arm2.limitations: The trial tested a moderate contrast in fluid volume (median difference only ~1108 mL over 24 hours) and vasopressor timing, so it does not inform more extreme strategies; both groups still received substantial fluid. It was conducted in Australia, New Zealand, and Ireland, which may limit generalizability to other health systems, and informed consent was not obtained for 37 patients (excluded from the ITT population). The primary outcome (days alive and out of hospital) was neutral and the trial was not powered to detect differences in mortality, which the abstract does not report.
arm2.limitations_ko: 이 시험은 수액량(24시간 median difference 약 1108 mL) 및 승압제 시점에서 중등도 정도의 차이만 비교했으므로 더 극단적인 전략에 대한 정보는 주지 못하며, 두 군 모두 상당량의 수액을 투여받았습니다. 호주·뉴질랜드·아일랜드에서 시행되어 다른 의료 체계로의 일반화가 제한될 수 있고, 37명은 informed consent를 얻지 못해 ITT 집단에서 제외되었습니다. 일차 결과(생존·퇴원 일수)는 중립적이었고, 사망률 차이를 검출할 만한 검정력은 없었으며 초록에 사망률 수치는 보고되지 않았습니다.

paper.title: Vasopressors or Fluids in Early Septic Shock.
paper.abstract:
BACKGROUND: The optimal approach to early resuscitation in septic shock is unknown. Equipoise exists between the use of larger volumes of intravenous fluids to restore perfusion and the use of early vasopressor therapy along with smaller volumes of fluids to minimize potential harm from excess fluid.
METHODS: We randomly assigned adult patients who presented to the emergency department with septic shock to receive either fluids at restricted volumes and early vasopressor therapy (vasopressor group) or higher volumes of fluids and later vasopressor therapy (fluids group) for at least 6 hours and up to 24 hours. The primary outcome was days alive and out of the hospital from randomization to day 90.
RESULTS: A total of 1000 patients underwent randomization, with 499 assigned to the vasopressor group and 501 to the fluids group. Informed consent was not obtained for 37 patients, which left 963 patients in the intention-to-treat population (481 in the vasopressor group and 482 in the fluids group). Three patients in the fluids group were lost to follow-up for the primary outcome. In the first 24 hours after randomization, patients in the vasopressor group received less intravenous fluid than those in the fluids group (median difference, -1108 ml; 95% confidence interval [CI], -1395 to -850). The percentage of patients who received vasopressors was higher by 18.9 percentage points (95% CI, 13.3 to 24.5) in the vasopressor group. The median number of days alive and out of the hospital at day 90 was 76 (interquartile range, 55 to 83) in the vasopressor group and 76 (interquartile range, 55 to 82) in the fluids group (difference, 0.0 days; 95% CI, -2.7 to 2.7; P = 1.00). Adverse events occurred in similar percentages of patients in the two groups, except for pulmonary edema (0.6% in the vasopressor group vs. 5.0% in the fluids group; P<0.001).
CONCLUSIONS: Among adult patients who presented to the emergency department with septic shock, an approach that involved restricted fluid volume and early vasopressors did not result in a greater number of days alive and out of the hospital at day 90 than an approach involving greater fluid volume and later administration of vasopressors. (Funded by the Australian National Health and Medical Council Medical Research Future Fund and the New Zealand Health Research Council; ARISE FLUIDS ClinicalTrials.gov number, NCT04569942.).

arm1.title_ko: 생명유지 지원 하의 영양 공급: ECMO 및 CRRT 적용 중 중증질환 환자의 대사·영양 관리
arm1.clinicalQuestion: In critically ill adults receiving life-support therapies (ECMO, mechanical circulatory support, CRRT), how should metabolic and nutritional management — calorie/protein targeting, micronutrient repletion, and monitoring — be approached given the absence of population-specific guidelines?
arm1.clinicalQuestion_ko: 생명유지 지원 치료(ECMO, 기계적 순환 보조[MCS], CRRT)를 받는 중증 성인 환자에서, 이 집단에 특화된 지침이 없는 상황에서 대사·영양 관리(열량/단백질 목표 설정, 미량영양소 보충, 모니터링)를 어떻게 접근해야 하는가?

pico.population: [International] Critically ill patients receiving life-support therapies like extracorporeal membrane oxygenation (ECMO), mechanical circulatory systems (MCS), and continuous renal replacement therapy (CRRT), which create a complex and dynamic metabolic environment; no specific guidelines exist for this population (narrative mini-review, no cohort N reported).
pico.intervention: Pragmatic nutritional assessment and delivery strategies for calorie-protein targeting, micronutrient repletion, and monitoring, emphasizing a 'start low, advance carefully' approach within a multidisciplinary framework.
pico.outcome: No quantitative primary outcome; as a narrative synthesis the review provides pragmatic recommendations addressing dramatic nutrient fluxes with CRRT, a possible hypermetabolic state exacerbated by ECMO, fluid overload constraints, and drug-nutrient interactions. No effect sizes, CIs, or p-values reported.

pico_ko.population: [다국가] 복잡하고 역동적인 대사 환경을 만드는 생명유지 지원 치료(ECMO, 기계적 순환 보조[MCS], CRRT)를 받는 중증 환자; 이 집단에 특화된 지침은 존재하지 않음(서술적 미니리뷰로 코호트 N은 보고되지 않음).
pico_ko.intervention: 열량-단백질 목표 설정, 미량영양소 보충, 모니터링을 위한 실용적 영양 평가 및 공급 전략으로, 다학제적 틀 안에서 '낮게 시작하여 신중히 증량(start low, advance carefully)'하는 접근을 강조함.
pico_ko.outcome: 정량적 1차 결과 없음; 서술적 종합으로서 CRRT에 따른 급격한 영양소 유출입, ECMO로 악화될 수 있는 과대사 상태, 수분과부하 제약, 약물-영양소 상호작용을 다루는 실용적 권고를 제시함. 효과크기·CI·p-value는 보고되지 않음.

practiceChange: Do not rely on standard ICU calorie/protein formulas for patients on ECMO or CRRT; adopt a 'start low, advance carefully' strategy and, where possible, use indirect calorimetry to individualize energy targets given the possible ECMO-exacerbated hypermetabolic state.

For patients on CRRT, actively anticipate and replete micronutrient and amino-acid losses from the circuit ('dramatic nutrient fluxes') and monitor for deficiencies, since standard delivery underestimates true losses.

Manage nutrition through a multidisciplinary team that accounts for fluid-overload constraints and drug-nutrient interactions, while recognizing that current recommendations rest on expert opinion and observational data rather than population-specific trial evidence.
practiceChange_ko: ECMO 또는 CRRT 환자에서 표준 ICU 열량/단백질 공식에 의존하지 말고, '낮게 시작하여 신중히 증량' 전략을 채택하며, ECMO로 악화될 수 있는 과대사 상태를 고려해 가능하면 indirect calorimetry로 에너지 목표를 개별화한다.
CRRT 환자에서는 회로를 통한 미량영양소·아미노산 손실('급격한 영양소 유출입')을 적극적으로 예상·보충하고 결핍 여부를 모니터링한다. 표준 공급으로는 실제 손실을 과소평가하기 때문이다.
수분과부하 제약과 약물-영양소 상호작용을 고려하는 다학제 팀을 통해 영양을 관리하되, 현재 권고가 집단 특화 임상시험 근거가 아니라 전문가 의견과 관찰 데이터에 기반함을 인식한다.
keyFindings: Life-support therapies (ECMO, MCS, CRRT) create a complex, dynamic metabolic environment, yet no specific nutritional guidelines exist for this population and current recommendations rest largely on expert opinion and observational data.
Key metabolic challenges include dramatic nutrient fluxes with CRRT, a possible hypermetabolic state exacerbated by ECMO, fluid overload constraints, and drug-nutrient interactions.

The review proposes pragmatic strategies for calorie-protein targeting, micronutrient repletion, and monitoring, emphasizing a 'start low, advance carefully' approach within a multidisciplinary framework.
keyFindings_ko: 생명유지 지원 치료(ECMO, MCS, CRRT)는 복잡하고 역동적인 대사 환경을 만들지만, 이 집단에 특화된 영양 지침은 없으며 현재 권고는 대부분 전문가 의견과 관찰 데이터에 기반한다.
주요 대사적 난제는 CRRT에 따른 급격한 영양소 유출입, ECMO로 악화될 수 있는 과대사 상태, 수분과부하 제약, 약물-영양소 상호작용을 포함한다.
이 리뷰는 열량-단백질 목표 설정, 미량영양소 보충, 모니터링을 위한 실용적 전략을 제안하며, 다학제적 틀 안에서 '낮게 시작하여 신중히 증량'하는 접근을 강조한다.
arm1.clinicalTakeaway: For critically ill patients on ECMO/MCS/CRRT, nutrition should be individualized and cautious rather than driven by standard ICU targets: start low and advance carefully, anticipate CRRT-related micronutrient and amino-acid losses, and manage within a multidisciplinary team mindful of fluid overload and drug-nutrient interactions. Clinicians should apply these as pragmatic, expert-opinion-level suggestions, not as evidence-based standards, given the lack of population-specific trials.
arm1.clinicalTakeaway_ko: ECMO/MCS/CRRT를 받는 중증 환자에서는 표준 ICU 목표에 따르기보다 영양을 개별화하고 신중히 접근해야 한다: 낮게 시작하여 신중히 증량하고, CRRT 관련 미량영양소·아미노산 손실을 예상하며, 수분과부하와 약물-영양소 상호작용을 고려하는 다학제 팀 안에서 관리한다. 집단 특화 임상시험이 없으므로, 이 권고는 근거 기반 표준이 아니라 전문가 의견 수준의 실용적 제안으로 적용해야 한다.
arm1.limitations: This is a narrative mini-review, not a systematic review or original study: it reports no sample size, no comparator, and no quantitative outcomes, effect sizes, or p-values. The synthesized evidence is explicitly limited and based largely on expert opinion and observational data, and no population-specific guidelines exist, so recommendations are pragmatic rather than validated. Risk of selection and author bias inherent to opinion-based mini-reviews applies.
arm1.limitations_ko: 본 논문은 체계적 문헌고찰이나 원저가 아닌 서술적 미니리뷰로, 표본 크기·비교군·정량적 결과·효과크기·p-value를 보고하지 않는다. 종합된 근거는 명시적으로 제한적이며 대부분 전문가 의견과 관찰 데이터에 기반하고, 집단 특화 지침이 없으므로 권고는 검증된 것이 아닌 실용적 수준이다. 의견 기반 미니리뷰에 내재하는 선택 및 저자 편향의 위험이 적용된다.

paper.title: Feeding under support in critical care illness: metabolic and nutritional management during extracorporeal membrane oxygenation and continuous renal replacement therapy.
paper.abstract:
PURPOSE OF REVIEW: The use of life-support therapies like extracorporeal membrane oxygenation (ECMO), mechanical circulatory systems (MCS), and continuous renal replacement therapy (CRRT) creates a complex and dynamic metabolic environment that profoundly challenges nutritional management for these critically ill patients. Current existing guideline recommendations are largely based on expert opinions and observational data. No specific guidelines exist for this population.
RECENT FINDINGS: This mini-review synthesizes the current, limited evidence on the pathophysiological and metabolic alterations induced by ECMO, MCS, and CRRT and provides pragmatic recommendations for nutritional assessment and delivery.
SUMMARY: The key challenges include dramatic nutrient fluxes in the case of CRRT, a possible hypermetabolic state exacerbated by ECMO, fluid overload constraints, and drug-nutrient interactions. Practical strategies are proposed for calorie-protein targeting, micronutrient repletion, and monitoring, emphasizing a 'start low, advance carefully' approach within a multidisciplinary framework.

arm2.title_ko: 급성 폐색전증에 대한 초음파-보조 카테터-유도 섬유소용해술 (HI-PEITHO 임상시험)
arm2.clinicalQuestion: In patients with acute, intermediate-risk pulmonary embolism, does ultrasound-facilitated, catheter-directed fibrinolysis with alteplase added to anticoagulation reduce early adverse outcomes compared with anticoagulation alone?
arm2.clinicalQuestion_ko: 급성 중등도위험(intermediate-risk) 폐색전증 환자에서, 항응고 단독요법 대비 alteplase를 이용한 초음파-보조 카테터-유도 섬유소용해술을 항응고에 추가하면 조기 불량 결과가 감소하는가?

pico.population: [International] The intention-to-treat population comprised 544 patients (273 intervention, 271 control) with intermediate-risk pulmonary embolism (RV/LV end-diastolic diameter ratio ≥1.0 and elevated troponin) who had at least two indicators of cardiorespiratory distress (systolic blood pressure ≤110 mm Hg, heart rate ≥100 bpm, or respiratory rate >20 breaths/min); mean age 58.2±13.5 years, 42.6% women. Enrolled at 59 sites in the U.S. and 8 European countries.
pico.intervention: Ultrasound-facilitated, catheter-directed fibrinolysis with alteplase plus anticoagulation, according to prespecified treatment protocols (n=273).
pico.comparison: Anticoagulation alone according to prespecified treatment protocols (n=271).
pico.outcome: Primary outcome (composite of PE-related death, cardiorespiratory decompensation or collapse, or symptomatic recurrence of PE within 7 days) occurred in 11 patients (4.0%; 95% CI, 2.3 to 7.1) in the intervention group vs 28 (10.3%; 95% CI, 7.2 to 14.5) in the control group (relative risk, 0.39; 95% CI, 0.20 to 0.77; P = 0.005), driven primarily by lower cardiorespiratory decompensation or collapse.

pico_ko.population: [다국가] intention-to-treat 모집단은 중등도위험 폐색전증 환자 544명(중재군 273명, 대조군 271명)으로, RV/LV 확장기말 직경비 ≥1.0 및 troponin 상승을 보이고 심폐 곤란 지표 2개 이상(수축기혈압 ≤110 mm Hg, 심박수 ≥100 bpm, 또는 호흡수 >20회/분)을 동반한 환자; 평균 연령 58.2±13.5세, 여성 42.6%. 미국 및 유럽 8개국 59개 기관에서 등록.
pico_ko.intervention: 사전 규정된 치료 프로토콜에 따라 alteplase를 이용한 초음파-보조 카테터-유도 섬유소용해술 + 항응고요법 (n=273).
pico_ko.comparison: 사전 규정된 치료 프로토콜에 따른 항응고 단독요법 (n=271).
pico_ko.outcome: 일차 결과(7일 이내 PE 관련 사망, 심폐 실조/허탈, 또는 증상성 PE 재발의 복합)는 중재군 11명(4.0%; 95% CI, 2.3–7.1) 대 대조군 28명(10.3%; 95% CI, 7.2–14.5)에서 발생(relative risk 0.39; 95% CI, 0.20–0.77; P = 0.005), 주로 심폐 실조/허탈의 감소에 기인함.

secondaryOutcomes: Major bleeding within 7 days after randomization: 11 patients (4.1%) in the intervention group vs 6 (2.2%) in the control group (P = 0.32).
Major bleeding within 30 days: 11 patients (4.1%) in the intervention group vs 8 (3.0%) in the control group (P = 0.64).
No intracranial hemorrhage occurred in either group, and no substantial between-group differences in other serious adverse events were observed up to 30 days.
secondaryOutcomes_ko: 무작위배정 후 7일 이내 major bleeding: 중재군 11명(4.1%) 대 대조군 6명(2.2%) (P = 0.32).
30일 이내 major bleeding: 중재군 11명(4.1%) 대 대조군 8명(3.0%) (P = 0.64).
양 군 모두 intracranial hemorrhage는 발생하지 않았으며, 30일까지 기타 중대 이상반응에서 유의한 군간 차이는 관찰되지 않음.

statGlossary.explanation_ko: 상대위험도: 대조군 대비 중재군에서 사건이 발생할 비율로, 1보다 작으면 위험 감소를 의미. 예: RR 0.39 → 중재군의 일차 결과 위험이 대조군보다 약 61% 낮음.
95% 신뢰구간: 참값이 있을 것으로 추정되는 범위로, RR의 구간이 1을 포함하지 않으면 통계적으로 유의. 예: RR 0.39의 95% CI 0.20–0.77 → 1을 넘지 않아 위험 감소가 통계적으로 유의함.
유의확률: 관찰된 차이가 우연일 확률로, 보통 0.05 미만이면 유의하다고 봄. 예: 일차 결과 P = 0.005 → 군간 차이가 우연일 가능성이 낮아 유의함(반면 major bleeding P = 0.32는 유의하지 않음).

practiceChange: In carefully selected intermediate-risk PE patients who have RV/LV ratio ≥1.0, elevated troponin, AND at least two markers of cardiorespiratory distress, consider early referral for ultrasound-facilitated catheter-directed fibrinolysis plus anticoagulation, as it lowered the 7-day composite of PE-related death, decompensation/collapse, or recurrence (RR 0.39; P=0.005).

Do not extrapolate this benefit to all intermediate-risk PE: the enrolled cohort was a higher-acuity 'intermediate-high' subgroup, and the benefit was driven by fewer decompensation/collapse events, not a proven mortality reduction.

Reassure regarding safety in this trial—major bleeding did not differ significantly (4.1% vs 2.2% at 7 days, P=0.32) and no intracranial hemorrhage occurred—but recognize this requires a catheter-capable center and appropriate device/protocol before adopting over anticoagulation alone.
practiceChange_ko: RV/LV 비 ≥1.0, troponin 상승, 그리고 심폐 곤란 지표 2개 이상을 모두 갖춘 신중히 선별된 중등도위험 PE 환자에서는 초음파-보조 카테터-유도 섬유소용해술 + 항응고의 조기 시행을 고려할 수 있다(7일 복합 결과 감소: RR 0.39; P=0.005).
이 이득을 모든 중등도위험 PE로 확대 적용하지 말 것: 등록 코호트는 고위험에 가까운 'intermediate-high' 하위군이었고, 이득은 사망 감소가 아닌 심폐 실조/허탈 사건 감소에 의해 주도되었다.
안전성 측면에서 본 시험에서는 major bleeding 차이가 유의하지 않았고(7일 4.1% 대 2.2%, P=0.32) intracranial hemorrhage도 없었으나, 항응고 단독요법 대비 채택하려면 카테터 시술이 가능한 센터와 적절한 기기·프로토콜이 필요함을 인식할 것.
keyFindings: The primary composite outcome (PE-related death, cardiorespiratory decompensation/collapse, or symptomatic PE recurrence at 7 days) occurred in 4.0% (11/273) of the intervention group vs 10.3% (28/271) of controls (RR 0.39; 95% CI 0.20–0.77; P=0.005).
The effect was driven primarily by a lower rate of cardiorespiratory decompensation or collapse in the intervention group.
Major bleeding did not differ significantly (7 days: 4.1% vs 2.2%, P=0.32; 30 days: 4.1% vs 3.0%, P=0.64), and no intracranial hemorrhage occurred in either group.
keyFindings_ko: 일차 복합 결과(7일 PE 관련 사망, 심폐 실조/허탈, 또는 증상성 PE 재발)는 중재군 4.0%(11/273) 대 대조군 10.3%(28/271)에서 발생(RR 0.39; 95% CI 0.20–0.77; P=0.005).
이 효과는 주로 중재군에서 심폐 실조/허탈 비율이 낮았던 것에 기인함.
Major bleeding은 유의한 차이 없음(7일: 4.1% 대 2.2%, P=0.32; 30일: 4.1% 대 3.0%, P=0.64), 양 군 모두 intracranial hemorrhage 없음.
arm2.clinicalTakeaway: In acute intermediate-risk PE with RV dysfunction, troponin elevation, and at least two signs of cardiorespiratory distress, ultrasound-facilitated catheter-directed fibrinolysis plus anticoagulation cut the 7-day composite of PE-related death, decompensation/collapse, or recurrence by ~61% (RR 0.39; P=0.005) without a significant excess of major bleeding or any intracranial hemorrhage. The benefit was driven by fewer decompensation/collapse events rather than mortality, so patient selection and access to a catheter-capable center are essential. This supports catheter-directed therapy as an option in this higher-acuity subgroup but does not mandate it for all intermediate-risk PE.
arm2.clinicalTakeaway_ko: RV 기능부전, troponin 상승, 심폐 곤란 지표 2개 이상을 동반한 급성 중등도위험 PE에서, 초음파-보조 카테터-유도 섬유소용해술 + 항응고는 7일 복합 결과(PE 관련 사망, 실조/허탈, 재발)를 약 61% 감소시켰고(RR 0.39; P=0.005) major bleeding의 유의한 증가나 intracranial hemorrhage는 없었다. 이 이득은 사망이 아닌 실조/허탈 사건 감소에 기인하므로 환자 선별과 카테터 시술 가능 센터 접근성이 필수적이다. 본 결과는 이 고위험 하위군에서 카테터-유도 치료를 하나의 선택지로 지지하지만, 모든 중등도위험 PE에 의무화하는 것은 아니다.
arm2.limitations: Abstract/authoritative-source data only (no full text available), so individual primary-outcome component counts and full secondary-outcome statistics could not be extracted. The trial was industry-funded (Boston Scientific) and enrolled a higher-acuity 'intermediate-high' subgroup requiring ≥2 cardiorespiratory distress markers, limiting generalizability to broader intermediate-risk PE. The 7-day primary window is short, the benefit was driven by non-fatal decompensation/collapse rather than mortality, and the open procedural nature (blinded adjudication notwithstanding) plus need for a catheter-capable center constrain external applicability.
arm2.limitations_ko: 전문(full text) 미제공으로 초록 및 authoritative 출처 데이터만 사용하여, 일차 결과 개별 구성요소 건수와 전체 secondary outcome 통계는 추출하지 못함. 산업 후원(Boston Scientific) 연구이며, 심폐 곤란 지표 ≥2개를 요구한 고위험에 가까운 'intermediate-high' 하위군을 등록하여 광범위한 중등도위험 PE로의 일반화가 제한됨. 일차 평가 기간이 7일로 짧고, 이득이 사망이 아닌 비치명적 실조/허탈에 기인하며, 시술의 개방적 특성(맹검 판정에도 불구)과 카테터 시술 가능 센터 필요성이 외적 적용성을 제한함.

paper.title: Ultrasound-Facilitated, Catheter-Directed Fibrinolysis for Acute Pulmonary Embolism.
paper.abstract:
BACKGROUND: Whether anticoagulation alone is an adequate treatment for acute, intermediate-risk pulmonary embolism is uncertain.
METHODS: We conducted a multinational, adaptive-design trial with blinded outcome adjudication. Patients with intermediate-risk pulmonary embolism (with a ratio of right ventricular end-diastolic diameter to left ventricular end-diastolic diameter of ≥1.0 and an elevated troponin level) were eligible if they had at least two indicators of cardiorespiratory distress (systolic blood pressure of ≤110 mm Hg, a heart rate of ≥100 beats per minute, or a respiratory rate of >20 breaths per minute). Patients were randomly assigned to undergo ultrasound-facilitated, catheter-directed fibrinolysis with alteplase plus anticoagulation (the intervention group) or anticoagulation alone (the control group) according to prespecified treatment protocols. The primary outcome was a composite of pulmonary embolism-related death, cardiorespiratory decompensation or collapse, or symptomatic recurrence of pulmonary embolism within 7 days.
RESULTS: The intention-to-treat population comprised 544 patients: 273 in the intervention group and 271 in the control group. The mean (±SD) age was 58.2±13.5 years, and 42.6% of the patients were women. A primary-outcome event occurred in 11 patients (4.0%; 95% confidence interval [CI], 2.3 to 7.1) in the intervention group and 28 (10.3%; 95% CI, 7.2 to 14.5) in the control group (relative risk, 0.39; 95% CI, 0.20 to 0.77; P = 0.005). The effect was driven primarily by a lower risk of cardiorespiratory decompensation or collapse in the intervention group. Major bleeding occurred within 7 days after randomization in 11 patients (4.1%) in the intervention group and 6 (2.2%) in the control group (P = 0.32); major bleeding occurred within 30 days in 11 patients (4.1%) and 8 patients (3.0%), respectively (P = 0.64). No substantial between-group differences in the incidence of other serious adverse events were observed up to 30 days after randomization; no intracranial hemorrhage occurred.
CONCLUSIONS: In patients with acute, intermediate-risk pulmonary embolism, ultrasound-facilitated, catheter-directed fibrinolysis plus anticoagulation led to a lower risk of the composite of pulmonary embolism-related death, cardiopulmonary decompensation or collapse, or symptomatic recurrence of pulmonary embolism within 7 days than anticoagulation alone. (Funded by Boston Scientific; HI-PEITHO ClinicalTrials.gov number, NCT04790370.).

arm1.title_ko: 급성 뇌졸중 진료팀에 임상약사를 통합하기 위한 합의 권고안: ACCP, Neurocritical Care Society, SAEM, SCCM 공동 승인 및 American Academy of Neurology 지지
arm1.clinicalQuestion: In adult patients presenting to the emergency department with acute ischemic stroke (AIS) or hemorrhagic stroke, should a clinical pharmacist be integrated into the acute stroke care team?
arm1.clinicalQuestion_ko: 응급실에 내원한 성인 acute ischemic stroke(AIS) 또는 hemorrhagic stroke 환자의 진료에서, 임상약사를 급성 뇌졸중 진료팀에 통합해야 하는가?

pico.population: [USA] Adult patients presenting to the emergency department (ED) with acute ischemic stroke (AIS) or hemorrhagic stroke; the consensus panel was composed of clinical pharmacists, emergency medicine physicians, and a vascular neurologist.
pico.intervention: Clinical pharmacist involvement/integration into the interdisciplinary acute stroke care team for management of both AIS and hemorrhagic stroke.
pico.comparison: Acute stroke care without dedicated clinical pharmacist integration (no formal comparator group; consensus statement using the GRADE approach).
pico.outcome: Consensus was reached, despite a very low level (certainty) of evidence, for two recommendations: (1) clinical pharmacist involvement in AIS care for adult patients presenting to the ED, and (2) clinical pharmacist involvement in hemorrhagic stroke care for adult patients presenting to the ED. No pooled effect sizes, confidence intervals, or p-values were reported in the abstract.

pico_ko.population: [미국] 응급실(ED)에 내원한 성인 acute ischemic stroke(AIS) 또는 hemorrhagic stroke 환자; 합의 패널은 임상약사, 응급의학과 의사, 그리고 vascular neurologist 1인으로 구성되었다.
pico_ko.intervention: AIS 및 hemorrhagic stroke 관리를 위해 다학제 급성 뇌졸중 진료팀에 임상약사를 참여·통합시키는 것.
pico_ko.comparison: 임상약사가 통합되지 않은 급성 뇌졸중 진료(별도의 대조군 없음; GRADE 방법론을 사용한 합의 성명서).
pico_ko.outcome: very low 수준(certainty)의 근거임에도, 두 가지 권고에 대해 합의에 도달함: (1) ED에 내원한 성인 AIS 진료에 임상약사 참여, (2) ED에 내원한 성인 hemorrhagic stroke 진료에 임상약사 참여. 초록에는 통합 효과크기, confidence interval, p-value가 보고되지 않았다.

statGlossary.explanation_ko: GRADE: 근거의 확실성(certainty)과 권고의 강도를 High/Moderate/Low/Very Low 등으로 등급화하는 표준 방법론. 예: 본 성명서는 very low certainty of evidence임에도 임상약사 통합에 대해 합의 권고를 도출함 → 근거는 매우 약하지만 전문가 합의로 권고가 제시된 상태.

practiceChange: EM/CCM teams should formally embed a clinical pharmacist in the acute stroke workflow (ED and neurocritical care) to support time-sensitive tasks such as thrombolytic dosing/screening in AIS and rapid anticoagulation reversal and blood-pressure management in hemorrhagic stroke.

Because the recommendation rests on very low certainty (expert consensus, not comparative outcome data), integrate pharmacists as a process/quality improvement measure while tracking local metrics (e.g., door-to-needle time, reversal time) rather than assuming a proven mortality or functional-outcome benefit.

Use this multi-society consensus to justify staffing/resourcing of dedicated stroke pharmacists and to standardize the pharmacist role across institutions, addressing the noted inconsistency and underutilization and improving equity in time-sensitive treatment.
practiceChange_ko: EM/CCM 팀은 급성 뇌졸중 워크플로(ED 및 neurocritical care)에 임상약사를 공식적으로 배치하여, AIS에서의 혈전용해제 용량 산정/스크리닝, hemorrhagic stroke에서의 신속한 anticoagulation reversal 및 혈압 관리 등 시간이 중요한 업무를 지원하도록 해야 한다.
권고가 very low certainty(비교 결과 데이터가 아닌 전문가 합의)에 근거하므로, 사망률·기능적 예후 개선이 입증되었다고 가정하기보다는 door-to-needle time, reversal time 등 자체 지표를 추적하는 과정/질 향상(QI) 조치로서 약사를 통합하는 것이 바람직하다.
이 다학회 합의를 활용해 전담 뇌졸중 약사의 인력·자원 확보를 정당화하고 기관 간 약사 역할을 표준화하여, 지적된 역할의 비일관성·과소활용 문제를 해소하고 시간 민감 치료의 형평성을 개선할 수 있다.
keyFindings: Using the GRADE approach, a multidisciplinary panel (clinical pharmacists, emergency medicine physicians, and a vascular neurologist) reached consensus on two recommendations supporting clinical pharmacist involvement in ED care of adult AIS and hemorrhagic stroke.
Both recommendations were made despite a very low level of evidence, reflecting reliance on expert consensus rather than high-quality comparative outcome data.

The panel concluded that optimizing the clinical pharmacist role is a critical factor for improving time-sensitive treatment and equity in care delivery, addressing the currently inconsistent and underutilized pharmacist role.
keyFindings_ko: GRADE 방법론을 사용해 다학제 패널(임상약사, 응급의학과 의사, vascular neurologist)이 성인 AIS 및 hemorrhagic stroke의 ED 진료에 임상약사 참여를 지지하는 두 가지 권고에 합의하였다.
두 권고 모두 very low 수준의 근거임에도 도출되었으며, 이는 고품질 비교 결과 데이터가 아닌 전문가 합의에 의존했음을 반영한다.
패널은 임상약사 역할의 최적화가 시간 민감 치료와 진료 형평성 개선의 핵심 요인이라고 결론지었으며, 현재 비일관적이고 과소활용된 약사 역할 문제를 겨냥하였다.
arm1.clinicalTakeaway: This multi-society consensus statement recommends integrating clinical pharmacists into ED-based acute stroke teams for both ischemic and hemorrhagic stroke, primarily to speed time-sensitive interventions (thrombolysis, anticoagulation reversal, BP control) and improve equity. However, the recommendations are based on very low certainty evidence, so pharmacist integration should be pursued as a reasonable, expert-endorsed process improvement rather than an outcome-proven mandate, with local performance metrics tracked to demonstrate value.
arm1.clinicalTakeaway_ko: 이 다학회 합의 성명서는 ischemic 및 hemorrhagic stroke 모두에서 ED 기반 급성 뇌졸중 팀에 임상약사를 통합할 것을 권고하며, 주로 혈전용해, anticoagulation reversal, 혈압 조절 등 시간 민감 중재의 신속화와 형평성 개선을 목표로 한다. 다만 권고가 very low certainty 근거에 기반하므로, 결과가 입증된 의무 사항이라기보다 전문가가 지지하는 합리적 과정 개선으로 접근하고 자체 성과 지표를 추적해 가치를 입증하는 것이 바람직하다.
arm1.limitations: The recommendations are supported only by a very low level (certainty) of evidence and represent expert consensus rather than direct comparative or randomized outcome data; no effect sizes, patient-level outcomes (e.g., mortality, functional/mRS outcomes), sample sizes, or confidence intervals are reported. The panel was US-based and small, with only a single vascular neurologist, limiting generalizability; only abstract-level information was available (full text not accessed), and publication/consensus-panel bias cannot be excluded.
arm1.limitations_ko: 권고는 very low 수준(certainty)의 근거로만 뒷받침되며 직접 비교나 무작위 결과 데이터가 아닌 전문가 합의를 나타낸다. 효과크기, 환자 수준 결과(예: 사망률, 기능적/mRS 예후), 표본 크기, confidence interval이 보고되지 않았다. 패널은 미국 중심이고 규모가 작으며 vascular neurologist가 1인뿐이어서 일반화 가능성이 제한된다. 초록 수준 정보만 확보되었고(전문 미접근), 출판/합의패널 편향을 배제할 수 없다.

paper.title: Consensus Recommendations for Clinical Pharmacist Integration into the Acute Stroke Care Team: Endorsed by the American College of Clinical Pharmacy, Neurocritical Care Society, Society for Academic Emergency Medicine, and Society of Critical Care Medicine, and affirmed by the American Academy of Neurology.
paper.abstract: Clinical pharmacists are increasingly recognized as vital contributors to acute stroke care, yet their role remains inconsistently defined and underutilized across health care systems. This consensus statement explores the expanding presence of clinical pharmacists within interdisciplinary stroke teams, particularly in the management of both acute ischemic stroke (AIS) and hemorrhagic stroke. This consensus statement panel was composed of clinical pharmacists, emergency medicine physicians, and a vascular neurologist. The Grading of Recommendations, Assessment, Development, and Evaluation (GRADE) approach was used to assess the level of certainty and strength of recommendations. We focused on two questions regarding the clinical pharmacist's role in caring for adult patients presenting to the emergency department (ED) with AIS or hemorrhagic stroke. Despite the very low level of evidence, a consensus was reached for the following recommendations: (1) clinical pharmacist involvement in AIS care for adult patients presenting to the ED and (2) clinical pharmacist involvement in hemorrhagic stroke care for adult patients presenting to the ED. Based on the available literature, we believe optimizing the clinical pharmacist role is a critical factor in improving time-sensitive treatment and equity in care delivery.
paper.journal: Journal of the American College of Clinical Pharmacy : JACCP

arm2.title_ko: 발병 4.5~24시간 후 비대혈관폐색(non-LVO) 급성 허혈성 뇌졸중에 대한 Tenecteplase: OPTION 무작위 임상시험
arm2.clinicalQuestion: In patients with non-large vessel occlusion acute ischemic stroke and salvageable brain tissue on perfusion imaging presenting 4.5 to 24 hours after onset, does intravenous tenecteplase improve 90-day functional outcome compared with standard medical treatment, and at what safety cost?
arm2.clinicalQuestion_ko: 관류영상에서 구제 가능한 뇌조직이 확인되고 발병 4.5~24시간에 내원한 비대혈관폐색(non-LVO) 급성 허혈성 뇌졸중 환자에서, 정맥내 tenecteplase가 표준 약물치료 대비 90일 기능적 예후를 향상시키는가, 그리고 그 안전성 대가는 무엇인가?

pico.population: [China] 566 patients with non-large vessel occlusion stroke and evidence of potentially salvageable tissue determined on perfusion imaging presenting within 4.5 to 24 hours of the time last seen well, recruited at 48 centers in China between June 2, 2023, and August 4, 2025 (median age, 68 [IQR, 59-75] years; 196 female [34.6%]).
pico.intervention: Intravenous tenecteplase (0.25 mg/kg; maximum dose, 25 mg; n = 282) administered 4.5 to 24 hours after stroke onset.
pico.outcome: Primary efficacy outcome was an excellent functional outcome, defined as a modified Rankin Scale (mRS) score of 0 or 1 at 90 days: 123 of 282 (43.6%) with tenecteplase vs 97 of 284 (34.2%) with control (risk ratio, 1.28 [95% CI, 1.04-1.57]; P = .02).

pico_ko.population: [중국] 관류영상(perfusion imaging)에서 구제 가능한 뇌조직이 확인되고 마지막 정상 확인 시점으로부터 4.5~24시간 이내에 내원한 비대혈관폐색(non-LVO) 뇌졸중 환자 566명. 2023년 6월 2일~2025년 8월 4일 중국 48개 센터에서 모집(중앙값 연령 68세[IQR 59-75], 여성 196명[34.6%]).
pico_ko.intervention: 발병 4.5~24시간에 투여한 정맥내 tenecteplase(0.25 mg/kg; 최대 25 mg; n = 282).
pico_ko.outcome: 일차 효능 결과는 우수한 기능적 예후(90일째 mRS 0 또는 1)로 정의됨: tenecteplase군 282명 중 123명(43.6%) 대 대조군 284명 중 97명(34.2%) (risk ratio 1.28 [95% CI 1.04-1.57]; P = .02).

secondaryOutcomes: Symptomatic intracranial hemorrhage within 36 hours: 2.8% with tenecteplase vs 0% with standard medical treatment (risk difference, 2.85% [95% CI, 1.16%-5.54%]; P = .004).
Mortality within 90 days: 5.0% with tenecteplase vs 3.2% with control (risk ratio, 1.57 [95% CI, 0.69-3.57]; P = .28).
secondaryOutcomes_ko: 36시간 이내 증상성 두개내출혈(symptomatic intracranial hemorrhage): tenecteplase군 2.8% 대 표준치료군 0% (risk difference 2.85% [95% CI 1.16%-5.54%]; P = .004).
90일 사망률: tenecteplase군 5.0% 대 대조군 3.2% (risk ratio 1.57 [95% CI 0.69-3.57]; P = .28).

statGlossary.explanation_ko: modified Rankin Scale: 0(증상 없음)~6(사망)으로 뇌졸중 후 장애 정도를 재는 척도로, 0~1은 사실상 후유장애가 없는 우수한 예후를 뜻함. 예: 이 연구의 일차 결과는 90일째 mRS 0~1 달성 비율(tenecteplase군 43.6%).
위험비: 두 군의 사건 발생 확률의 비로, 1보다 크면 해당 결과가 더 흔함을 의미. 예: RR 1.28 → tenecteplase군이 대조군보다 우수한 예후 도달이 상대적으로 28% 더 흔함.
위험차: 두 군의 사건 발생률 차이(절대값). 예: risk difference 2.85% → tenecteplase군의 증상성 두개내출혈 발생률이 대조군보다 절대적으로 2.85%p 높음.
95% 신뢰구간: 참값이 있을 것으로 추정되는 범위로, 위험비의 구간이 1을 포함하지 않으면 통계적으로 유의함. 예: RR 1.28의 95% CI 1.04-1.57 → 1을 넘지 않아 효능이 유의함.
p-value: 결과가 우연으로 생겼을 확률로, 보통 0.05 미만이면 통계적으로 유의하다고 봄. 예: 일차 결과 P = .02 → 우연일 가능성이 낮아 유의함(반면 사망률 P = .28은 유의하지 않음).

practiceChange: For non-LVO acute ischemic stroke with perfusion-confirmed salvageable tissue presenting 4.5-24 hours after last-seen-well, IV tenecteplase (0.25 mg/kg, max 25 mg) can now be considered as a perfusion-selected extended-window option, having improved mRS 0-1 at 90 days (43.6% vs 34.2%; RR 1.28).

Counsel patients/families on the trade-off: the benefit comes with a real bleeding cost — symptomatic intracranial hemorrhage rose from 0% to 2.8% (risk difference 2.85%; P = .004), while the 90-day mortality difference (5.0% vs 3.2%) was not statistically significant.

Do not extrapolate beyond the tested selection: eligibility hinged on advanced perfusion imaging confirming salvageable tissue and confirmed absence of large-vessel occlusion, so centers lacking rapid perfusion imaging or in populations outside a Chinese cohort should apply this cautiously.
practiceChange_ko: 관류영상으로 구제 가능한 조직이 확인되고 마지막 정상 확인 4.5~24시간에 내원한 non-LVO 급성 허혈성 뇌졸중에서, IV tenecteplase(0.25 mg/kg, 최대 25 mg)는 관류영상으로 선별된 확장시간창 선택지로 고려할 수 있음 — 90일 mRS 0~1을 개선(43.6% 대 34.2%; RR 1.28).
이득에는 실질적 출혈 대가가 따름을 환자·보호자에게 설명해야 함: 증상성 두개내출혈이 0%에서 2.8%로 증가(risk difference 2.85%; P = .004)했으며, 90일 사망률 차이(5.0% 대 3.2%)는 통계적으로 유의하지 않았음.
검증된 선별 기준을 벗어난 확대 적용은 금물: 자격 기준이 고급 관류영상으로 구제 가능한 조직을 확인하고 대혈관폐색(LVO) 부재를 확인하는 데 달려 있었으므로, 신속 관류영상이 없는 기관이나 중국 코호트 외 인구집단에서는 신중히 적용해야 함.
keyFindings: IV tenecteplase 4.5-24 h after onset in non-LVO stroke with salvageable tissue increased excellent functional outcome (mRS 0-1) at 90 days: 43.6% (123/282) vs 34.2% (97/284) with standard care (risk ratio, 1.28 [95% CI, 1.04-1.57]; P = .02).
Symptomatic intracranial hemorrhage within 36 hours was significantly higher with tenecteplase: 2.8% vs 0% (risk difference, 2.85% [95% CI, 1.16%-5.54%]; P = .004).
90-day mortality was numerically higher but not statistically significant: 5.0% vs 3.2% (risk ratio, 1.57 [95% CI, 0.69-3.57]; P = .28).
keyFindings_ko: 구제 가능한 조직이 있는 non-LVO 뇌졸중에서 발병 4.5~24시간의 IV tenecteplase는 90일 우수한 기능적 예후(mRS 0~1)를 증가시킴: 43.6%(123/282) 대 표준치료 34.2%(97/284) (risk ratio 1.28 [95% CI 1.04-1.57]; P = .02).
36시간 이내 증상성 두개내출혈은 tenecteplase군에서 유의하게 높았음: 2.8% 대 0% (risk difference 2.85% [95% CI 1.16%-5.54%]; P = .004).
90일 사망률은 수치상 더 높았으나 통계적으로 유의하지 않았음: 5.0% 대 3.2% (risk ratio 1.57 [95% CI 0.69-3.57]; P = .28).
arm2.clinicalTakeaway: In perfusion-selected patients with non-LVO ischemic stroke presenting 4.5-24 hours after last-seen-well, IV tenecteplase modestly improves the chance of a near-disability-free outcome at 90 days but roughly triples-plus the absolute risk of symptomatic intracranial hemorrhage (from 0% to 2.8%). This positions late-window tenecteplase as a reasonable option only where advanced perfusion imaging confirms salvageable tissue and after shared decision-making about the bleeding trade-off. Mortality was not significantly increased, but the trial was not powered for that endpoint.
arm2.clinicalTakeaway_ko: 마지막 정상 확인 4.5~24시간에 내원한 관류영상 선별 non-LVO 허혈성 뇌졸중 환자에서 IV tenecteplase는 90일째 사실상 무장애 예후 가능성을 완만하게 높이지만 증상성 두개내출혈의 절대위험을 0%에서 2.8%로 크게 증가시킴. 따라서 후기 시간창 tenecteplase는 고급 관류영상으로 구제 가능한 조직이 확인되고 출혈 위험에 대한 공유의사결정(shared decision-making)을 거친 경우에만 합리적 선택지가 됨. 사망률은 유의하게 증가하지 않았으나 이 시험은 사망 종말점에 대한 검정력을 갖추지 않았음.
arm2.limitations: Open-label design (only end points were blinded), leaving room for performance bias in care; single-country trial conducted entirely at 48 centers in China, limiting generalizability to other populations; strict enrollment required advanced perfusion imaging to confirm salvageable tissue and absence of large-vessel occlusion, so results do not apply to unselected patients or centers lacking such imaging; the trial was underpowered for mortality (wide CI 0.69-3.57), and no secondary efficacy outcomes were retrievable from the abstract/authoritative sources to further characterize the benefit-risk profile.
arm2.limitations_ko: 공개표지(open-label) 설계로 결과 판정만 눈가림되어 진료 과정에서 수행 편향(performance bias) 여지가 있음; 중국 48개 센터에서만 수행된 단일 국가 시험으로 다른 인구집단으로의 일반화가 제한됨; 등록 기준이 구제 가능한 조직과 대혈관폐색(LVO) 부재를 확인하는 고급 관류영상을 요구하여, 선별되지 않은 환자나 그런 영상이 없는 기관에는 적용 불가; 사망률에 대해서는 검정력이 부족했고(넓은 CI 0.69-3.57), 이득-위험 프로파일을 더 규명할 이차 효능 결과는 초록·권위 있는 출처에서 확보되지 않음.
